author: doll-agent
content: Implemented mulx for all 6 bases: polymulx (shifts coefficients up by one), chebmulx (uses xT_k = (T_{k+1}+T_{k-1})/2), legmulx (xP_k = ((k+1)P_{k+1}+kP_{k-1})/(2k+1)), lagmulx (xL_k = -(k+1)L_{k+1} + (2k+1)L_k - k L_{k-1}), hermmulx (xH_k = H_{k+1}/2 + k H_{k-1}), hermemulx (xHe_k = He_{k+1} + k He_{k-1}). Each takes &[f64] coeffs and returns Vec<f64>. Tests verify x·P(x) consistency via eval at sample points for cheb/legendre/hermite_e (after fixing the pre-existing Clenshaw bugs noted in #619).
